# Visant Labs

> Visant Labs is an AI design platform that turns brand guidelines into production-ready mockups, creatives, and brand identities — accessible via MCP, REST API, or web UI.

## Live endpoints

- MCP Server: `POST https://api.visantlabs.com/api/mcp` (Streamable HTTP, MCP 2025-11-25)
- LLM discovery (dynamic): https://api.visantlabs.com/llms.txt (always up-to-date tool count)
- Full LLM reference (dynamic): https://api.visantlabs.com/llms-full.txt
- OpenAPI spec: https://api.visantlabs.com/api/docs/api/spec
- OAuth discovery: https://api.visantlabs.com/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server
- Public brand context demo (no auth): https://api.visantlabs.com/api/brand-guidelines/public/visant/context?output=text

## Repository structure

- `/server` — Express.js backend (API + MCP server)
- `/server/mcp/platform-mcp.ts` — All MCP tool definitions (annotated with readOnlyHint/destructiveHint)
- `/server/lib/mcp-constants.ts` — SSoT for MCP config (endpoint, spec version, limits)
- `/server/routes/llms.ts` — Dynamic llms.txt/llms-full.txt generation
- `/src` — React frontend (Vite + Tailwind)
- `/src/config/branding.ts` — SSoT for app branding (company name, links, support email)
- `/prisma` — Database schema (MongoDB via Prisma)
- `/tests` — Vitest suites

## Key concepts

- **Brand Guidelines as AI input**: guidelines are structured data that feed into mockup/creative generation — not just static documentation.
- **MCP-first**: the platform is designed for agent access. All 116 tools have `readOnlyHint`/`destructiveHint` annotations and `title` fields.
- **OAuth 2.1**: PKCE (S256) + Dynamic Client Registration for Claude Connector Directory compatibility.
- **Optimized data layer**: list endpoint uses field projection + pagination; detail endpoint returns full data. Redis cache invalidation on mutations. React Query with optimistic updates.

## SSoT files

| What | File |
|------|------|
| MCP config (endpoint, version, limits) | `server/lib/mcp-constants.ts` |
| App branding (name, links, email) | `src/config/branding.ts` |
| Database schema | `prisma/schema.prisma` |
| Tool definitions (MCP) | `server/mcp/platform-mcp.ts` |
| Cache keys & TTLs | `server/lib/cache-utils.ts` |
